plugins.name: co-research
plugins.description: CO for Research (COR). Co-author academic papers with AI. Citation integrity, literature synthesis, hostile reviewer simulation, two co-authorship modes.

plugins.name: co-finance
plugins.description: CO for Finance (COF). Financial analysis and education. Study guides, case analysis, exam preparation, research papers, course-specific tutors.

plugins.name: co-education
plugins.description: CO for Education (COE). Design assessments and rubrics that account for AI use. Instructor-side tools for GenAI-aware pedagogy.

plugins.name: co-governance
plugins.description: CO for Governance (COG). Organizational self-governance. Constitutional compliance, RFC processes, transparency reporting. The Foundation governs itself using this.

plugins.name: co-compliance
plugins.description: CO for Compliance (COComp). Regulatory analysis. Requirement extraction, control mapping, gap assessment, audit preparation.

plugins.name: co-template
plugins.description: CO Template. Build your own CO application for any professional domain. Provides the five-layer structure, example agents, and workflow commands.
